---
title: " "
output: html_document
---



```{r eval=F, echo=F}
setwd(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
filp <- 'vignettes/Graphical.Rmd'
rmarkdown::render(filp)
system(paste0('brave vignettes/Graphical.html'))
```

```{r include=FALSE}
library(ManifoldDestiny)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(randNames)
library(openxlsx)
library(patchwork)
library(writexl)
library(plotly)
library(ViewPipeSteps)
library(RefManageR)
library(ggpubr)
```


```{r, eval=T, echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
### Loading equations
#setwd(rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file())
source('../inst/script/stylized.R')
```

```{r include=FALSE}
library(ManifoldDestiny)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(randNames)
library(openxlsx)
library(patchwork)
library(writexl)
library(plotly)
library(ViewPipeSteps)
library(RefManageR)
library(ggpubr)
```

# Graphical: Fair election process
## Tab 1
Some text here abc
```{r, echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
g <- gcou$plotxy(c("x","y"))
ggplotly(g)
```

## Tab 2
```{r, echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
#gquil <- gcou$plot2d(selvp=c("x","y","alpha"),selvl=c("x_pred","y_pred","alpha_pred"))
#gzeta <- gcou$plot2d(selvp=c("zeta"),selvl='zeta_m')
#plotly::subplot(gquil,gzeta,nrows=2)
```

## Tab 3	
```{r, echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
#plotly(gcou$resplot(resvar=c('zeta_m','y_s_res')))
```

## Tab 4	
```{r, echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
#gcou$resplot(resvar=c('zeta_m','y_s_res'))
```

## Tab 5
```{r, echo=F, message=F, warning=F}
gcou$trplot(c('x','y','alpha'))
```

# Rigged election process: Fair election process
## Tab 1
## Tab 2
## Tab 3	
## Tab 4
